case_title: CALIFORNIA FEDERAL BANK vs. LAWSON, CLEO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT SERVED OCT-20-1997, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
